releases.title: collectZ v3.4.137
releases.summary: This patch adds a queued Plex reconciliation preview job.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.136
releases.summary: This patch adds a read-only Plex full-library reconciliation preview.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.135
releases.summary: This patch adds explicit Plex writeback controls to Plex-linked media detail drawers.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.134
releases.summary: This patch adds explicit Plex rating writeback for one existing Plex-linked collectZ row.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.133
releases.summary: This patch adds explicit Plex watched-state writeback for one existing Plex-linked collectZ row.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.132
releases.summary: This patch proves the Plex watched-state writeback contract before enabling any real app-driven Plex mutation.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.131
releases.summary: This patch adds a safe Plex rating readback apply path for existing collectZ rows.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.130
releases.summary: This patch adds an opt-in Plex watched-state refresh scheduler for existing Plex-linked collectZ rows.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.129
releases.summary: This patch adds the first explicit Plex watched-state apply path for existing collectZ rows.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.128
releases.summary: This patch adds the read-only Plex watch-state sync contract that future watched/progress automation will build on.
